title: Delicate Snappy German Fish Skewers
description: Buttery and snappy German fish skewers featuring sea salt, cooked to perfection in a bain-marie, served in a bento-box.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together melted butter, sea salt, parsley, lemon juice, garlic powder, and black pepper.
Add the cod fish pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the butter mixture.
Thread 2-3 fish pieces onto each bamboo skewer, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers in a bain-marie, making sure the water level is below the bottom of the skewers.
Cover the bain-marie with aluminum foil and bake for 8-10 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let cool for 2 minutes.
Serve the fish skewers in a bento-box, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
